meaning: n.飞行,逃走,飞跃,飞机的航程,班机,追逐,楼梯的一段,射程vi.成群飞行,迁徙vt.射击(飞禽),使惊飞
examples: We're booked on the same flight.
My flight was an hour late.
But early biological predispositions beyond the individual's control propelling them on a flight path to violence?
In 1930, the airship R100 set out on its first passenger-carrying flight from England to Canada.
